hypothesis: Already-selected trend_long Technology signals in a marginal risk-on regime_exit_score band may be lower-quality trend noise, so cutting their risk to 25% could reduce weak-window leakage without changing entries, exits, ranking, or LLM behavior.
why_not_llm_soft_ranking: LLM soft-ranking remains production-sample limited; this deterministic test used fields already present in both production and backtest sizing. The LLM data limitation did not block this separate capital-allocation alpha test.

avoided_recent_do_not_repeat_families: No high-score plain risk_on retry after exp-20260430-001 rejected it as inert.
No OHLCV-only new entry or weak-hold early exit.
No nearby accepted low/mid risk_on score-bucket multiplier tuning.
pre_experiment_checks.candidate_alpha_hypothesis: Technology trend marginal risk-on de-risking might reduce residual Technology trend leakage with a production-shared sizing discriminator.

parameters.single_causal_variable: trend_long Technology marginal risk-on risk multiplier

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull after accepted allocation stack
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with weakest win rate

gate4_basis: Rejected and rolled back. The rule improved old_thin slightly but damaged mid_weak and did not improve aggregate EV or PnL. It failed all Gate 4 acceptance criteria.
mechanism_insight: Technology trend marginal risk-on score is not a clean de-risking discriminator. The same 0.10-0.13 score band includes weak TSM/AMD-like losers and useful APP/AAPL-like winners, so a simple score sleeve cuts valid convex Technology trend exposure.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking remains data-limited, so this deterministic sizing alpha was tested instead.

rejection_reason: Mid_weak EV and PnL regressed, aggregate EV/PnL regressed, and no trade count, win rate, survival, or drawdown improvement offset the damage.
do_not_repeat_without_new_evidence: Simple trend_long Technology marginal risk-on score-band de-risking around 0.10-0.13
Using regime_exit_score alone as the missing Technology trend discriminator
Adding another Technology trend risk haircut without event/state evidence that separates APP/AAPL-like winners from TSM/AMD/SNOW-like losers
next_retry_requires: A non-score event/state discriminator for Technology trend lifecycle quality
Forward sample showing marginal-score Technology trend trades have distinct tail-adjusted expectancy
Production-shared inputs that can distinguish delayed winners from normal weak trend noise
